Question: What is partial discharge (PD)?
Option_A: A complete breakdown of insulation in high voltage systems
Option_B: A localized electrical discharge in a compromised insulating medium
Option_C: A phenomenon only occurring in low voltage systems
Option_D: An issue that only affects the outer surface of insulation
Correct_Answer: A localized electrical discharge in a compromised insulating medium
